title: rubus × orogenes
intro: Rubus × orogenes, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a plant that combines the desirable traits of both parent species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × orogenes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through various methods, including fresh consumption, jam-making, and dried leaf infusions.
